evals.name: non-alphabetical-scramble-order
evals.prompt: Convert this Coursiv step-ordering exercise into the Markdown format we use for exercise notes: /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/510wq.png and /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/510wa.png
evals.expected_output: See /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/510w.md for the target shape, BUT that reference file's 'Initial order' section (d, a, c, b) does not match the scrambled screenshot's actual visual order — verified directly against the image, which shows cards printed top-to-bottom as a, b, c, d. Per the same judgment call made for the `prompt` and `columns` skills' analogous discrepancies, the skill follows the actual screenshot, so this eval's initial order legitimately differs from 510w.md. Confirmed correct order from the images: d, a, c, b (unchanged from the reference — only the initial-order transcription differs).
